title: OT filing UI deployed but blocked by #19 and #20
observed: S170 Phase 3 deployed /dashboard/hr/overtime/apply but: (a) RoleGuard excludes ROLES.CREW so crew cannot access it (Defect #19); (b) submit fails with ValidationError: No attendance record found on 2026-04-06 (Defect #20 — test env limitation)
expected: OT filing accessible to crew role; form submits successfully against an attendance record

title: Leave Ledger Entry pipeline broken (R1 verified fixed)
observed: Lane D EMP-LEAVE-003: HR-LAP-2026-00118 Approved (docstatus=1) but Leave Ledger Entry returned empty array. Production leave balances would not deduct.
expected: Approved Leave Application creates Leave Ledger Entry row with leaves=-1
recommended_sprint: S170 (FIXED — Phase 1 backfill script verified by R1)

title: Compensation [employee] route empty shell (R3 verified fixed)
observed: Lane A SPIKE: editBtnFound=false editorInputs=0 — compensation-setup/[employee] page rendered no editable salary fields. The page file was a Dialog component masquerading as a Page component.
expected: Full compensation page with editable salary fields
recommended_sprint: S170 (FIXED — Phase 2 deployed; R3 confirmed EMP-UX-004 PASS_POST_FIX)

title: Clearance doctypes do not exist (R3 + R5 verified module renders)
observed: Lane A A5a: BEI Clearance / BEI Clearance Station / BEI Clearance Item DocTypes absent. All EMP-TERMINATE-* scenarios SKIP. Clearance module was read-only milestone tracker (EMP-STUB-005 COLLATERAL).
expected: Clearance module with station assignment item tracking and Documenso e-signature
recommended_sprint: S170 (FIXED — Phase 4 deployed minimum-viable clearance; R3 confirmed EMP-STUB-005 PASS_POST_FIX; note: Documenso deferred)

title: Generate Slips button disabled
observed: Lane G EMP-PAYROLL-RUN-001 FAIL: Generate Slips button disabled in payroll processing UI for current period (Apr 2026). No salary slips exist for period. Button could not be triggered.
expected: HR can initiate payroll generation for any period via Generate Slips button

title: List-page compensation modal empty (R3 verified fixed)
observed: Lane F EMP-UX-004 COLLATERAL: Compensation Setup list modal showed only Bio ID — no editable salary fields. Root cause: same as Defect #3 (Dialog component as Page).
expected: Compensation modal shows salary structure components and edit controls
recommended_sprint: S170 (FIXED — Phase 2 fix confirmed by R3 EMP-UX-004 PASS_POST_FIX)

title: Finance approve/reject ambiguous for sensitive changes (R3 verified)
observed: Lane F EMP-UX-005 DEFECT_NOT_REPRODUCED in original run. R3 re-observed post S170: EMP-UX-005 PASS_POST_FIX — Finance can approve/reject sensitive salary changes from UI.
expected: Finance role has visible Approve/Reject buttons on sensitive-changes queue

title: create_employee_direct returns cached employee_id constant
observed: Lane C: create_employee_direct API response always returns employee_id='BEI-EMP-2026-00004' regardless of which employee was actually created. Docname must be resolved via separate Desk list query.
expected: API response returns the actual created employee docname

title: test.hr proxy permission gap on /api/frappe/api/resource/Employee
observed: Lane C: /api/frappe/api/resource/Employee returns 403 via my.bebang.ph proxy for test.hr. frappe.client.get_list not whitelisted. Blocks any downstream workflow requiring docname lookup after employee creation.
expected: test.hr can read Employee list via proxy API for workflow operations

title: employee-master dashboard vs list behavior
observed: Wave 0 preconditions expected a searchable Employee list table. Lane C found /dashboard/hr/employee-master renders aggregate dashboard cards + filter pills — not a searchable table with row links. Blocks UI-based docname resolution.
expected: Searchable employee list with clickable rows and docname access
recommended_sprint: Triage: product decision on dashboard vs list design

title: Soft-delete order dependency (relieving_date before status)
observed: Lane C: set_value(status=Left) BEFORE set_value(relieving_date) returns ValidationError: Please enter relieving date. Order must be relieving_date first.
expected: Either order accepted OR clear error guides correct order

title: emergency_phone_number silently dropped on Employee save
observed: Lane A A2: EMP-EDIT-CONTACT-002 FAIL — Emergency contact middle_name field not exposed in EmployeeDetailDialog contact section. The form has no input for this field.
expected: Emergency contact middle_name editable in contact section

title: Reports To field has no autocomplete
observed: Lane A A2: EMP-EDIT-EMPLOYMENT-003 SKIP — Reports To field in EmployeeDetailDialog employment section has no suggestion dropdown or autocomplete. HR must type exact employee name.
expected: Reports To field has searchable autocomplete/combobox

title: First-of-session BSCR silently rolled back
observed: Lane A A5c (CONFLICT-001 related): first BSCR in a new browser session may be silently rolled back before server acknowledgment. Subsequent saves succeed. Intermittent behavior.
expected: All BSCRs persist regardless of session freshness

title: _activate_compensation_change silent failure (R4 blocked by #21)
observed: Lane A A4: EMP-SALARY-CHANGE-002 FAIL — BCC approved in dual-control queue but Salary Structure Assignment not activated afterwards. R4 could not retest because all update_compensation API calls failed (Defect #21 Frappe routing failure — hrms.api.payroll vs hrms.api.payroll_compensation).
expected: BCC approval automatically activates corresponding Salary Structure Assignment
recommended_sprint: S171 (pending fix of Defect #21 Frappe routing)

title: BEI Incident Report.store is Link Warehouse but UI passes Branch name
observed: Lane A A5b: EMP-DISCIPLINARY-001 DEFECT-PASS — disciplinary case form submits successfully in browser but backend returns 417. Root cause: BEI Incident Report.store field links to Store/Warehouse DocType but the UI passes a Branch name string. Link validation fails.
expected: BEI Incident Report.store field accepts Branch name OR form uses correct linked field

title: /dashboard/hr/overtime/apply RoleGuard excludes ROLES.CREW
observed: R2-Fix: test.crew1 gets restricted=true hasForm=false on /overtime/apply. Only test.hr test.supervisor test.area can access the form. ROLES.CREW is not in the allowed roles list for the OT filing page.
expected: Crew role can access OT filing form (crew members file their own overtime)

title: OT filing API requires pre-existing attendance record (test env limitation)
observed: R2-Fix: EMP-OVERTIME-001 FAIL — create_overtime_request returns ValidationError: No attendance record found on 2026-04-06. Overtime can only be filed for days you actually worked. Test environment has no attendance records for test.hr on that date.
expected: OT API accepts OT filing for any valid date (or: test environment has seeded attendance records)
recommended_sprint: S171 (note: may be valid product rule — test environment needs attendance seed data)

title: Comp page Edit button gated on existing SSA — chicken-and-egg for new employees
observed: R5 Probe: compensation-detail-panel.tsx line 165 has disabled={!detail}. get_employee_compensation_detail returns null when no Salary Structure Assignment exists. This makes the Edit button permanently disabled for new employees who have never had a salary set — HR cannot create the first SSA via the UI. Must use API directly (which itself has Frappe routing defect #21-Fix3).
expected: Edit button enabled for new employees (shows empty form); OR separate Create SSA flow available
